summary: Refined architecture evaluation for Panel de Personas web application. Compares 4 approaches, recommending pre-computed Parquet in Azure Blob Storage (~$30-75/month). Includes detailed patterns for: name search with suggestions using a lightweight personas_index.parquet (~50MB in-memory), bulk search with Excel export via Polars write_excel, and container deployment. Covers security (TLS, SAS tokens, RBAC), data transfer without VPN (azcopy), and concrete FastAPI backend code examples.
